fund_name: ICICI Prudential PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth

text: Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 18.35. Sharpe ratio: 1.17. Alpha: 1.03. Beta: 0.81.

fund_name: ICICI Prudential PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Expense ratio is 2.60%. Exit load policy: Exit Load 1% if redeem before 1 month from the date of allotment. Minimum SIP investment is ₹100. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
